CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar May-12-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Michael Jay Mandel, Esq. for Plaintiff: Dennis Eison, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Wen Gu Jian ind. and dba Jian's Construction.
Matter is submitted and under submission for review of the award.
Proposed Judgment received in court.
P.M.
Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Wen Gu Jian ind/dba Jian's Construction as follows:
Damages $89,000.00
Costs $371.44 for a total of $89,371.44
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2005 Continued To Jun-17-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
